{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145937C625418B5A6858A8D163"}"},"total":31},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554196290023408408","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，一天多看完的，节奏个人很喜欢，如果能多点番外就好了，综的家教出场好少，粉家教看到出场的时候乐死了，结果马上就没戏份了，嘎巴一下躺下了[送心]期待作者下一本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758853734,"group_id":"7490592181418216510","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人到了年纪就只吃糖了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9tlK9DrW8M6WYZ5Xr9Ujw3LSz7UsRVnSM0q7EL+mYYT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1e24b7c25f894795a8672818e80077c6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797028&x-signature=m8QD4SnJD2WEapon83qVMmOsEUk%3D","user_id":"3597212838280558","user_name":"三.青"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3597212838280558","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7490592181418216510","book_info":{"abstract":"（全文完结）小池神月花费1000日元买到了一款恋爱RPG手游，抱着尝试的心思试了试，后来因为肚子饿下线觅食，结果再次登录游戏就被那个她最讨厌的讨嫌DK质问她为什么会昏迷了两个月。
　　紧接着被对方质问为什么总是凭空从空气中变出一堆东西，吓得她当即退游掰了游戏卡带，甚至去寺庙里烧香拜佛一个星期。
　　回到家后，她在游戏里遇到的角色突然变成活人找上门了……
　　不是……为什么恋爱游戏会成真啊！！！
　　（不会写简介，cp5t5和夏油杰，主要走日常剧情）
（综了一部分《野良神》《月刊少女野崎君》《咒怨》《家庭教师》剧情，只有两三章，主咒回）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe6dd11878f54d15e1596792d103b9028~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"追风筝的梧蒽","author_id":"","book_id":"7490592181418216510","book_name":"为什么恋爱游戏会成真","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7490594270265492030","read_count":"786","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"221882"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"107","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,异世穿越,穿越,二次元","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe6dd11878f54d15e1596792d103b9028~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433177&x-signature=ZZ%2F3Ad6AIexi96Bc2tto%2BvuWuWo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3720376640344669","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"186"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145937C625418B5A6858A8D163"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17695,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39849,"reply_count"
